ChangeRequest.name: Model context in the primary key of Risk position (Kb) per bucket derived data
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview The entity type _Risk position (Kb) per bucket derived data_ needs to have the model context in the key.
### Contact person @Arjan.Bos
### Description of change request Every entity type whose data is under the specific control of the reporting agent needs to have the model context as part of its primary key. Currently _Risk position (Kb) per bucket derived data_ does not have this. We propose to add the model context as part of the key.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes - Risk position (Kb) per bucket derived data - Model context
### Forward Engineering considerations This will change the primary key for the Enriched Input Layer for _Risk position (Kb) per bucket derived data_.
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
